course_title: IMPLEMENTING UNIVERSAL DESIGN: CURRICULUM DEVELOPMENT & ANALYSIS
description: Engage in joint inquiry and analysis of curriculum, instruction, and assessment using principles of Universal Design and differentiation. Study and utilize collegial dialogue protocols to interrogate previously taught or anticipated units of instruction. Revise and refine universally designed curricula.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Curriculum and Instruction: Secondary Education MS andCURRIC 507
